plan_metadata.name: Sample Adaptive Card Notification Local Debug

steps.description: Type the text 'Adapative Card Notification' into the search input field located at the top of the "Samples" tab within the Microsoft 365 Agents Toolkit interface in Visual Studio Code.

Click the "Create" button for the "Adaptive Card Notification" sample in the Microsoft 365 Agents Toolkit extension within Visual Studio Code, indicated by the red crosshair at position (788, 342).And input ${{var:app_name:adaptive-card-notification}} into the run time variable.
@assertion there is text "New Event Occurred!" exists.
